metadata.description: Player account related endpoints for World of Tanks Console API
metadata.note: These endpoints provide access to player account information, achievements, and platform-specific data
metadata.live_discrepancies_note: Unlike the PC API, there is NO /wotx/account/tanks/ method on the console API (returns METHOD_NOT_FOUND) — use /wotx/tanks/stats/ for per-vehicle player statistics. Live behavior verified 2026-07-16.

players.description: Returns partial list of players. The list is filtered by initial characters of user name and sorted alphabetically.

search.description: Player name search string. Parameter 'type' defines minimum length and type of search. Using the exact search type, you can enter several names, separated with commas. Maximum length: 24.

fields.description: Response field. The fields are separated with commas. Embedded fields are separated with dots. To exclude a field, use '-' in front of its name. In case the parameter is not defined, the method returns all fields. Maximum limit: 100.

language.description: Localization language. Valid values: en, ru, pl, de, fr, es, tr.

limit.description: Number of returned entries (fewer can be returned, but not more than 100). If the limit sent exceeds 100, a limit of None is applied (by default).

type.description: Search type. Valid values: 'startswith' — Search by initial characters of player name. Minimum length: 3 characters. Maximum length: 24 characters. (by default) 'exact' — Search by exact match of player name. Case insensitive. You can enter several names, separated with commas (up to 100).

errors.description: Search parameter not specified with no account_id
Search parameter is not long enough. Allowed value depends on type parameter.
Limit of specified names in search parameter exceeded (>100)

live_discrepancies: statistics.all contains lifetime totals ONLY — there are no draws, avg_damage, avg_xp, or win_ratio fields; derive them client-side (draws = battles - wins - losses). The spotting counter is named 'spotted', not 'spots'.
Without an access_token, 'private', 'statistics.company', and 'statistics.frags' come back as null.

access_token.description: Access token for the private data of a user's account; can be received via the authorization method; valid within a stated time period

fields.description: Response field. The fields are separated with commas. Embedded fields are separated with dots. To exclude a field, use '-' in front of its name. In case the parameter is not defined, the method returns all fields. Maximum limit: 100.

language.description: Localization language. Valid values: en, ru, pl, de, fr, es, tr.

errors.description: Limit of passed-in account_id IDs exceeded. Maximum: 100.

player_achievements.description: Returns players' achievement details. Achievement properties define the achievements field values: 1-4 for Mastery Badges and Stage Achievements (type: 'class'); maximum value of Achievement series (type: 'series'); number of achievements earned from sections: Battle Hero, Epic Achievements, Group Achievements, Special Achievements, etc. (type: 'repeatable, single, custom').

fields.description: Response field. The fields are separated with commas. Embedded fields are separated with dots. To exclude a field, use '-' in front of its name. In case the parameter is not defined, the method returns all fields. Maximum limit: 100.

language.description: Localization language. Valid values: en, ru, pl, de, fr, es, tr.

player_xuid_data.description: Returns player details based on the player Microsoft XUID.

player_psnid_data.description: Returns player data based on Play Station UID.
